channel.title: Microsoft Service Health Tracker — A Guide to Cloud & AI
channel.description: Microsoft 365 service health incidents — tracked and searchable

item.title: [Microsoft Intune] Some users' newly enrolled devices in Microsoft Intune may be unable to access company resources
item.description: [Microsoft Intune] Users' newly enrolled devices in Microsoft Intune may be unable to access company resources.

item.title: [Exchange Online] Some users may be unable to access email messages in Outlook Mobile when connecting to Exchange on‑premises
item.description: [Exchange Online] Users may have been unable to access email messages in Outlook Mobile when connecting to Exchange on‑premises.

item.title: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Some users may experience degraded file search results in Microsoft 365 Copilot
item.description: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Users may have experienced degraded file search results in Copilot.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat] Users' responses from Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat are delayed up to seven seconds or longer
item.description: [Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat] Users' responses from Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat were delayed up to seven seconds or longer.

item.title: [Exchange Online] Users may be unable to download or open email attachments in Outlook on the web
item.description: [Exchange Online] Users may be unable to download or open email attachments in Outlook on the web.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 suite] Users may experience issues accessing or using multiple Microsoft 365 services, including Microsoft Teams and Outlook
item.description: [Microsoft 365 suite] Users may have experienced intermittent delays in email delivery and access to Microsoft 365 services.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 suite] Admins may see delays with some reports in the Microsoft 365 admin center
item.description: [Microsoft 365 suite] Admins may see delays with some reports in the Microsoft 365 admin center.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 suite] Some users in the United States may have been unable to access multiple Microsoft 365 services
item.description: [Microsoft 365 suite] Users may have been unable to access multiple Microsoft 365 services.

item.title: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Some users may experience errors or pages failing to load when accessing Microsoft 365 Copilot
item.description: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Users may have been unable to load pages when accessing Copilot.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 suite] A small subset of admins in North America and Brazil may be unable to access the Microsoft 365 admin center
item.description: [Microsoft 365 suite] A subset of admins in North America and Brazil may have been unable to access the Microsoft 365 admin center.

item.title: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Some users may see stale or delayed data in the Microsoft Copilot Dashboard within Microsoft Viva Insights
item.description: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Users may have seen stale or delayed data in the Microsoft Copilot Dashboard within Microsoft Viva Insights.

item.title: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Admins may see stale or delayed Microsoft 365 Copilot report metrics in the Microsoft 365 admin center
item.description: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Admins may have seen stale or delayed Microsoft 365 Copilot report metrics in the Microsoft 365 admin center.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 suite] Users may see delays with some reports in the Microsoft 365 admin center
item.description: [Microsoft 365 suite] Users may have seen delays with some reports in the Microsoft 365 admin center.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 suite] Some users may be unable to access the Microsoft 365 web sign-in page and the Microsoft 365 Copilot web sign‑in page
item.description: [Microsoft 365 suite] Users may have been unable to access the Microsoft 365 web sign-in page and the Microsoft 365 Copilot web sign‑in page.

item.title: [Exchange Online] Users may be intermittently unable to access their Exchange Online mailboxes in some connection methods.
item.description: [Exchange Online] Users may be intermittently unable to access their Exchange Online mailboxes in some connection methods.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 suite] Central US admins may be unable to access or experience delays accessing the Microsoft 365 admin center
item.description: [Microsoft 365 suite] Admins may have been unable to access or experience delays accessing the Microsoft 365 admin center

item.title: [Microsoft Viva] Some users may be unable to load Microsoft Viva Insights
item.description: [Microsoft Viva] Users may have been unable to load Microsoft Viva Insights.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat] Users' queries may fail with an error message in Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat
item.description: [Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat] Users' queries may have failed with an error in Copilot Chat.

item.title: [Microsoft Intune] Users may be unable to install user targeted apps that have been made available in the Intune Company Portal
item.description: [Microsoft Intune] Users may have been unable to install user targeted apps that have been made available in the Intune Company Portal.

item.title: [Microsoft Viva] Users may be unable to load the Data Quality page in Microsoft Viva Insights and receive an error
item.description: [Microsoft Viva] Users may have been unable to load the Data Quality page in Microsoft Viva Insights and received an error.

item.title: [Microsoft Purview] Some admins may be unable to access Activity Explorer in the Microsoft Purview portal
item.description: [Microsoft Purview] Admins may have been unable to access Activity Explorer in the Microsoft Purview portal.

item.title: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Most users’ prompts in GPT 5.4 Think Deeper mode in Microsoft 365 Copilot may return a failure response
item.description: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Users’ prompts in GPT 5.4 Think Deeper mode in Microsoft 365 Copilot may have returned a failure response.

item.title: [Microsoft Purview] We’ve detected an issue with required subscriptions for Microsoft Purview inline data protections in Edge for Business
item.description: [Microsoft Purview] If not addressed, collection and Data Loss Prevention policies for user data uploads to unmanaged apps may not work.

item.title: [Microsoft Purview] Some admins may be unable to see some policy events in the Microsoft Purview Communication Compliance portal
item.description: [Microsoft Purview] Admins may have been unable to see some policy events in the Microsoft Purview Communication Compliance portal.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 suite] Admins may see stale or delayed data in ProPlusUsage reports within the Microsoft 365 admin center
item.description: [Microsoft 365 suite] Admins may have seen stale or delayed data in ProPlusUsage reports within the Microsoft 365 admin center.

item.title: [SharePoint Online] Some users may have been unable to access the new Clipchamp start page in SharePoint Online
item.description: [SharePoint Online] Users may have been unable to access the new Clipchamp start page in SharePoint Online.

item.title: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Admins may see stale or delayed Microsoft 365 Copilot report metrics in the Microsoft 365 admin center
item.description: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Admins may have seen stale or delayed Copilot report metrics in the Microsoft 365 admin center.

item.title: [Exchange Online] Users may be unable to access archived email messages in Outlook on the web
item.description: [Exchange Online] Users may be unable to access archived email messages in Outlook on the web.

item.title: [Exchange Online] Some users may have been unable to access their Exchange Online mailboxes using the Outlook desktop client
item.description: [Exchange Online] Users may have been unable to access their Exchange Online mailboxes using the Outlook desktop client.

item.title: [Microsoft Defender XDR] Admins may notice excessive memory usage on their Windows Server 2016 machines
item.description: [Microsoft Defender XDR] Admins may have noticed excessive memory usage on their Windows Server 2016 machines.

item.title: [SharePoint Online] Users may be unable to edit SharePoint Online sites using the SharePoint Designer 2013 tool
item.description: [SharePoint Online] Users may be unable to edit SharePoint Online sites using the SharePoint Designer 2013 tool.

item.title: [Exchange Online] Admins may be unable to create shared mailboxes in Exchange Online
item.description: [Exchange Online] Admins may have been unable to create shared mailboxes in Exchange Online.

item.title: [Power BI] Users may be unable to summarize report content using Copilot for Microsoft Fabric
item.description: [Power BI] Users may have been unable to summarize report content using Copilot for Microsoft Fabric.

item.title: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Some users may be unable to create new interactions with specific Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365) bots
item.description: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Users may have been unable to create new interactions with specific Copilot bots.

item.title: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Some users' requests to use edit mode to interact with Microsoft Word documents in Copilot may fail
item.description: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Users' requests to use edit mode to interact with Microsoft Word documents in Copilot may have failed.

item.title: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Users may be unable to mention Microsoft 365 Copilot bots in Microsoft Teams
item.description: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Users may have been unable to mention Microsoft 365 Copilot bots in Microsoft Teams.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 suite] Some users in the United States may be intermittently unable to access some Microsoft 365 services
item.description: [Microsoft 365 suite] Users in the United States may have been intermittently unable to access some Microsoft 365 services.

item.title: [Microsoft Defender XDR] Admins may see delayed or missing new Attack Simulation Training (AST) campaign training notifications in Defender
item.description: [Microsoft Defender XDR] Admins may have seen delayed or missing new AST campaign training notifications in Microsoft Defender for Office 365.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 suite] Some users may have been unable to access Office.com or the Microsoft 365 Copilot web sign‑in page
item.description: [Microsoft 365 suite] Users may have been unable to access Office.com or the Microsoft 365 Copilot web sign‑in page.

item.title: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Users' Sales add-in may not appear on Outlook mobile and Outlook for Mac clients
item.description: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Users' Sales add-in may not appear on Outlook mobile and Outlook for Mac clients.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 suite] Some users may be unable to access Office.com or the Microsoft 365 Copilot web sign‑in page
item.description: [Microsoft 365 suite] Users may have been unable to access Office.com or the Microsoft 365 Copilot web sign‑in page.

item.title: [Exchange Online] Some users may experience issues when accessing their Exchange Online mailbox via one or more connection method
item.description: [Exchange Online] Users may have experienced errors when accessing their mailbox via multiple Exchange Online connection methods.

item.title: [Microsoft Defender XDR] Users may see delays with some reports including scheduled reports in Microsoft Defender for Office 365
item.description: [Microsoft Defender XDR] Users may have seen delays with some reports including scheduled reports in Microsoft Defender for Office 365.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat] Users may be unable to save their personalization settings within Microsoft Copilot Chat and encounter an error
item.description: [Microsoft 365 Copilot Chat] Users may have been unable to save their personalization settings within Copilot Chat and encountered an error.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 suite] Users see incomplete device assignments for Windows feature updates in Microsoft Intune and Windows Autopatch
item.description: [Microsoft 365 suite] Users saw incomplete device assignments for Windows feature updates in Microsoft Intune and Windows Autopatch.

item.title: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Users may encounter errors when interacting with the Microsoft Copilot Facilitator bot within any Microsoft Teams client
item.description: [Microsoft Copilot (Microsoft 365)] Users may have encountered errors when interacting with the Copilot Facilitator bot within any Microsoft Teams client.

item.title: [Microsoft 365 suite] Some admins' Microsoft 365 admin center usage report data may be delayed
item.description: [Microsoft 365 suite] Admins' Microsoft 365 admin center usage report data may have been delayed.

item.title: [Exchange Online] Some users may be unable to access the default add-ins in Outlook
item.description: [Exchange Online] Users may have been unable to access the default add-ins in Outlook.

item.title: [Exchange Online] Some users may be unable to access custom add-ins through any Exchange Online connection method
item.description: [Exchange Online] Users may have been unable to access custom add-ins through any Exchange Online connection method.

item.title: [Exchange Online] Some users may be unable to use classic Outlook when the Teams Meeting Add-in is enabled
item.description: [Exchange Online] Users may be unable to use classic Outlook when the Teams Meeting Add-in is enabled.
